name: Structural Fabrication 1
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Verify all steel components against fabrication drawings before cutting. Ensure material grade compliance and dimensional accuracy.", "type": "text"}]}]}

name: Structural Fabrication 2
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Weld all joints using FCAW process as per WPS-102. Conduct visual inspection post-weld and prepare for NDT.", "type": "text"}]}]}

name: Structural Fabrication 3
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Install gusset plates and stiffeners as indicated on the IFC drawings. Ensure squareness of assemblies prior to final welding.", "type": "text"}]}]}

name: Steel Erection 1
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Position and align steel columns using crane and guide ropes. Ensure plumbness with laser level and secure with temporary bracing.", "type": "text"}]}]}

name: Steel Erection 2
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Bolt beams to columns using ASTM A325 bolts. Apply torque as per specifications and verify connections using calibrated torque wrench.", "type": "text"}]}]}

name: Steel Erection 3
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Check erection tolerances against project standards. Record measurements and submit for structural engineer approval before next phase.", "type": "text"}]}]}

name: Steel Surface Preparation 1
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Perform abrasive blasting to SSPC-SP10 standard. Remove all mill scale, rust, and contaminants from steel surfaces.", "type": "text"}]}]}

name: Steel Surface Preparation 2
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Clean steel using solvent wipe method after grinding operations. Ensure surface is dry and free of oil or grease before coating.", "type": "text"}]}]}

name: Steel Surface Preparation 3
data: {"type": "doc", "content": [{"type": "paragraph", "attrs": {"textAlign": "left"}, "content": [{"text": "Apply zinc-rich primer to prepared surfaces within 4 hours of blast cleaning. Maintain ambient conditions per paint manufacturer's guidelines.", "type": "text"}]}]}
